#NEVER copied from a real export; every genotype is hand-fabricated to exercise
#Plan §9.4 dispositive-XX path (>=1 heterozygous non-PAR chrX call).
# AncestryDNA array version: V2.0
rsid	chromosome	position	allele1	allele2

rs9000104	23	80000000	C	C
